Overall, these results suggest that the HoloLens 2 may be viable for hand rehabilitation applications and the dataset generated can be used to refine pose estimation methods for hand-impaired populations.
tldr: 研究显示手部障碍和遮挡对手部姿态估计精度影响不大，HoloLens 2可用于手部康复应用。
motivation: 混合现实手部康复应用依赖准确姿态估计，但缺乏对手部障碍和真实物体交互遮挡影响的研究，以及AR HMD与先进算法的比较。
method: 使用HoloLens 2和WiLoR、HaMeR、WildHands、MediaPipe算法，对脊髓损伤患者和健康对照组在与透明和不透明物体交互时进行姿态估计，通过多摄像机三角测量生成3D关节位置地面真值。
result: 姿态估计精度在cSCI组和对照组间无差异；透明物体比不透明物体精度高0.1毫米；WiLoR和HaMeR比HoloLens 2精度高2毫米。
conclusion: HoloLens 2对手部康复应用可行，生成的数据集可用于改进针对手部障碍人群的姿态估计方法。

title: TerraTransfer: Learning End-to-End Driving Policies Without Expert Demonstrations
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has achieved state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks and real-world deployments. Its standard training recipe, however, is expensive across all stages: collecting and labeling millions of driving frames is costly, and closed-loop RL on images is bottlenecked by the per-step cost of photorealistic rendering plus a forward pass through a large vision backbone. Self-play in vectorized simulators changes the economics: millions of rollout steps per second, and a state distribution naturally rich in collisions, near-misses, and recoveries that no driving log contains. Our approach exploits this asymmetry by decoupling learning to drive from learning to see. We pretrain a single policy by self-play, then align its latent space with a pretrained vision backbone, through the action KL divergence and a batch-relational low-rank structural loss. The action target comes from the self-play policy, so alignment never supervises against a logged trajectory: a paired dataset of (image, scene-state) frames suffices, with no need for the curated expert demonstrations that imitation pretraining is built on. On photorealistic 3D Gaussian splatting closed-loop scenarios, the resulting end-to-end policy matches or exceeds prior end-to-end methods.
tldr: 提出TerraTransfer，通过自对弈预训练策略并与视觉骨干对齐，无需专家演示即可训练端到端驾驶策略。
motivation: 端到端自动驾驶的标准训练流程昂贵，依赖大量标注和专家演示；而自对弈在向量化模拟器中高效且生成丰富状态数据。
method: 解耦驾驶学习与视觉学习：先通过自对弈预训练策略，再使用动作KL散度和批量相关低秩结构损失将策略潜在空间与预训练视觉骨干对齐，仅需配对（图像，场景状态）帧数据集。
result: 在真实感3D高斯溅射闭环场景中，所提端到端策略匹配或超越了先前的方法。
conclusion: 无需专家演示即可学习驾驶策略，显著降低训练成本，方法有效且具有扩展潜力。

title: Improving and Evaluating Hand-Object Interaction Detection
abstract: Understanding hands and the objects they interact with, both directly and through tools, is a key step for tasks ranging from action perception to 3D reconstruction and robotics. Our paper provides several contributions to the Hand-Object Interaction (HOI) understanding literature: (1) HOI-DETR, a new framework that introduces hand-object and object-object interactions to the Co-DETR architecture to produce a state-of-the-art method; (2) a comprehensive HOI evaluation suite of 4 diverse datasets, including a video benchmark derived from the HD-EPIC dataset and fresh annotations that improve the Hands23 benchmark and (3) a trained checkpoint that significantly improves the state of the art across Hands23, HOIST, FineBio, and HD-EPIC, including mAP gains of over 20 percentage points on Hands23 and FineBio. Our ablations confirm the contributions of each model component.
tldr: 提出HOI-DETR框架和全面评估套件，在多个数据集上显著提升手-物交互检测性能。
motivation: 理解手与物体的交互对于动作感知、3D重建和机器人技术至关重要，当前方法在准确性和泛化性上存在不足。
method: 基于Co-DETR架构引入手-物和物-物交互，构建HOI-DETR框架，并创建包含4个数据集的评估套件，改进Hands23基准。
result: 在Hands23、HOIST、FineBio和HD-EPIC数据集上取得最先进结果，mAP提升超过20个百分点。
conclusion: 提出的方法和基准推动了手-物交互理解领域的发展，通过消融实验验证了各组件的贡献。

title: RegimeVGGT: Layer-Wise Spatially Preserving Redundancy Removal for Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
abstract: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) recovers dense 3D scene structure from multi-view images in one forward pass, but quadratic cross-frame attention limits its scalability. Existing training-free accelerators reduce computation uniformly along one axis, missing layer heterogeneity. Our spectral, probing, and causal analyses reveal three regimes: shallow layers lack cross-view structure, middle layers drive cross-view alignment, and deep layers are redundant for dense geometry yet their cross-frame attention remains essential for pose. RegimeVGGT applies layer-wise U-shaped compression along two axes: Saliency-Guided Banded Merging protects geometry- and edge-salient tokens, while Selectively Protected K/V Downsampling preserves cross-frame spatial coverage and the pose-critical path through a phase-shifted spatial grid, a reference-frame anchor, and uncompressed camera/register tokens. Training-free, RegimeVGGT achieves a 6.7x speedup over VGGT* at matched reconstruction quality.
tldr: RegimeVGGT通过层间U形压缩实现6.7倍加速，同时保持VGGT的3D重建质量。
motivation: VGGT的二次交叉帧注意力限制了可扩展性，现有训练自由加速器忽略层异质性。
method: 通过谱、探测和因果分析识别三种regime，应用层间U形压缩：Saliency-Guided Banded Merging保护几何和边缘显著令牌，Selectively Protected K/V Downsampling通过相移空间网格、参考帧锚点和未压缩摄像头/注册令牌保持交叉帧空间覆盖和姿态关键路径。
result: 在匹配重建质量下，RegimeVGGT相比VGGT*实现6.7倍加速。
conclusion: 提出一种训练自由的层间冗余去除方法，显著加速VGGT而不牺牲质量，具有实际应用潜力。

title: CAOA -- Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment
abstract: Accurately aligning CAD models to their corresponding objects in indoor RGB-D scans is a central challenge in 3D semantic reconstruction. The task requires estimating a 9-Degree-of-Freedom (DoF) pose-position, rotation, and scale along three axes-but is hindered by noisy and incomplete scans, as well as segmentation errors that cause geometric distortions. We present Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment (CAOA), a method that integrates a semantically and contextually aware point cloud completion module with a symmetry-aware relative pose estimation algorithm, enabling precise alignment of CAD models to scanned objects. Existing completion methods are typically trained and evaluated on synthetic datasets, which often fail to generalize to real-world scans. To bridge this gap, we introduce a synthetic data generation strategy tailored to indoor scenes, significantly reducing the synthetic-to-real domain gap-validated through quantitative comparisons with widely used completion datasets. In addition, we release S2C-Completion, an expert-annotated dataset of over 8,500 object-CAD pairs from Scan2CAD, created for real-world indoor single-object completion and intended as a new benchmark for this task. For object-CAD alignment, we incorporate symmetry information via a symmetry-aware loss, improving robustness to symmetric ambiguities. On the Scan2CAD benchmark, CAOA achieves a 17% accuracy improvement over state-of-the-art methods.
tldr: CAOA结合上下文感知的补全模块与对称性感知的位姿估计，在Scan2CAD上实现了17%的精度提升。
motivation: 在室内RGB-D扫描中精确对齐CAD模型到对应物体是3D语义重建的核心挑战，但受限于噪声、不完整扫描和分割误差导致的几何失真。
method: 提出Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment (CAOA)方法，集成语义与上下文感知的点云补全模块和对称性感知的相对位姿估计算法；并引入针对室内场景的合成数据生成策略以减少域差距。
result: 在Scan2CAD基准上，CAOA相比最先进方法实现了17%的精度提升；同时发布了包含8500+物体-CAD对的专家标注数据集S2C-Completion。
conclusion: CAOA通过整合补全与对称性感知对齐，显著提高了CAD模型与扫描物体的对齐鲁棒性和精确性，并为单物体补全提供了新基准。
